subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter hath been presented before the Wronged One, and that which was mentioned therein hath been noted by the servant in attendance before His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله کتابت در محضر مظلوم حاضر و آنچه در او مذکور عبد حاضر لدی الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
